# GoalOS Command Console v64

GoalOS Command Console is the front-and-center public-safe command surface for GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension.

A visitor types a plain-language objective into one large box. The page locally drafts a Mission Contract, Evidence Docket plan, Verifier Mesh, Governed Decision State, route handoff, and GoalOSCommandReceipt.

## Public-safe boundary

No account. No form submission. No wallet connection. No token approval. No analytics. No cookies. No browser storage. No network request from the console. No transaction broadcast. No production authority. No user data retained.

## Relationship to existing pages

This page is separate from Ask GoalOS and Mission Autopilot. It does not remove or replace any existing route. It provides the simplest front door and hands users to the strongest preserved route.

## Route

`/goalos-command-console.html`
